nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes:
Called by discovery_email.json and discovery_sam_gov.json after every successful ingest (regardless of mode). Produces the '📥 New RFP ingested' Slack card so manual-mode doesn't look like a dead pipeline.

Request:
  POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/kaizen/ingest-notify
  { "rfp_id": "<uuid>" }
